ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light Crime Scene Investigate

The ASR Federal 21 UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light brings LED technology to the ultraviolet spectrum. Featuring 21 UV light LED light bulbs, this compact UV light LED flashlight might be small but, it shines exceptionally bright! And, with LED technology on its side, the battery life will last much longer than any other regular flashlight you might currently have in your pantry or utility drawer (three AAA batteries are included).

As mentioned in the product description, the ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light emits a wavelength of 395nm. This specific wavelength is classified as Ultraviolet A, which covers the range from 315 to 400nm, also known as ‘long wave’ UV not absorbed by the ozone layer; this is an optimal strength of UV wavelength for inducing clear and thorough fluorescence effects.

Key Features

  • 21 LED UV LIGHT BULBS: Featuring 21 UV light LED light bulbs, the ASR Federal UV light LED flashlight black light shines exceptionally bright for a small, compact carrier flashlight, emitting a wavelength of 395nm
  • MULTI-PURPOSE: The UV light LED flashlight black light is useful for crime scene investigation, detecting body fluids, identifying credit card frauds, determining counterfeit money or ID, forged printed materials, inspecting artwork and can aid in increased security through invisible inks, marks and stamps and much more
  • ULTRA COMPACT DESIGN: The ASR Federal pocket-sized UV light LED flashlight is portable, easily fits in the palm of your hand and features an anti-slip textured grip and top carrier loop for easy and convenient handling, transport or travel
  • INCREASED SECURITY: The ASR Federal 21 UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light was specifically designed to be paired with the ASR Federal UV Theft Detection Powder and ASR Federal UV Invisible Ink Marker Pens; essentials for enhanced home or business security or security professionals; a great gift for spy or espionage enthusiasts
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Powered by three AAA batteries (included); Color: black; Length: 3.9 inches; Head diameter: 1.4 inches; Wavelength: 395nm; 21 LED light UV light bulbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 9LEDUV-957
  • UPC: 060886592747
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 6 in

Arguably one of the most convenient and multi-purpose gadgets in your home, workplace, campsite or car, UV light flashlights reveal much more than a regular flashlight ever could. At ASR Federal, our focus is security and the 21 UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light is essential to have on hand when faced with the following scenarios:

- Crime scene investigation - Identification of body fluids like saliva, urine or semen - Identification of counterfeit currency - Identification of credit card frauds - Determine the authenticity of passports and ID - Identification of forged printed materials - Inspection and identification of artwork and antiques - Security for postal stamps - Examining traces of theft detection powder - Discovering covert communication or marks by invisible ink

Other purposes include:

- Determination of leaks or cracks in an air circulation system - Determination of leaks or cracks in heating vents, gas pipes or plumbing pipes - House inspection - Hotel room inspection - Discovering pet stains/waste fluids - Gemstone or mineral inspection - Fishing lures - Insect lures - Mold inspection - Scorpion illumination

The ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light is small and compact, making it a must-have to have at home, but even more convenient to carry in your work bag, crime scene investigation tote, or to take with you when traveling. With an anti-slip textured grip and sturdy top carrier loop for easy transport, the ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light is lightweight and easily portable for all your identification, discovery and inspection needs when you’re on the go.

Whether you’re using the ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light for security purposes, crime scene investigation or looking to ensure exceptionally clean spaces in your home, car or commercial workplace, a UV light LED flashlight will change your approach, make you more efficient and increase your awareness of your surroundings. As a private or public safety or security professional, the ASR Federal 21 Bulb UV Light LED Flashlight Black Light is an essential staple, and will undoubtedly aid in your detection, investigation and inspection processes.
